codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the three prior blocking findings from pdf-png-export. Department filtering is now applied before capture, salary elements are now targetable (and hide/show works during export), and viewport fitting/restoration is added so capture includes off-screen nodes after fitView.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Implementation-worker procedure emphasizes test-first and behavior verification, but the fix still added only type/interface-oriented unit checks for ExportContext and no assertions for the three corrected export behaviors (department-filtered output, salary-included/excluded output, and fitView-based full-canvas capture).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: packages/client/src/__tests__/exportOrgChart.test.ts adds ExportContext shape tests only; no DOM/capture behavior assertions were added for exportOrgChart.ts changes.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the fix transcript skeleton plus both diffs (original pdf-png-export and fix-export-scrutiny). The prior blocking issues are resolved in code, with no new blocking defects identified.
